ddt:Target.Name: RADAR_C1A_v7
ddt:Target.Description:
/******************************************************************************************************** * * * RADAR GEN4 / Frontal Radar / Continental - ARS410RT28 * * PDE: Antoine PARIS - Martin SMETS * * * /********************************************************************************************************
13/10/2017 - MS - v5: -Mise à jour des routines d'alignement
-------------------------------------------- 10/11/2017 - MS - v5.2: -Modification of DID for the first configuration file -Add auto-ident of new softwares
-------------------------------------------- 14/11/2017 - MS - v5.3 -Add missing fault type -Add $101B DID
-------------------------------------------- 22/11/2017 - MS - v5.4 -Modify DTC fault type for DTC 6582 (71 -> 97)
-------------------------------------------- 22/11/2017 - MS - v5.5 -Add DiagAddon -Modify Default type -Add auto-ident
-------------------------------------------- 22/03/2018 - MS - v6 -Fix $F0D1 -Fix DTC $6587 (1C -> 1D) -------------------------------------------- 30/03/2018 - MS - v6.1 -Fix size Snapshot $0102 -Add auto-ident SW6 -Fix alignment routines
-------------------------------------------- 08/08/2018 - MS - v6.2 -Fix Aftersale alignment screen
------------------------------------------- 24/09/2018 - MS - v6.3 -Add Auto-ident SW7.01.11 -Fix resolution errors on DiagAddon mileage datas -Remove DTC Mux (except BCM_V1 and Fr_Camera_ITS)
------------------------------------------- 21/11/2018 - MS - v6.4 -Add some config parameters -Add auto-ident
------------------------------------------- 21/12/2018 - MS - v6.5 -Correction Alignment routine (Aftersale) -Add DID $6594
------------------------------------------- 14/01/2019 - MS - v6.6 -Add DIDs P_tng_kph_EVO_SpeedMinAebsCity, P_tng_kph_EVO_SpeedMinAebsPed, P_tng_kph_SpeedMinAebsCyc,P_tng_x_LowSunLevel,P_tng_x_BlurredImageNightLvl, P_tng_x_RoadSprayLevel, P_tng_x_SmearedSpotsLevel, P_tng_x_SmearedSpotsNightLvl
------------------------------------------- 15/02/2019 - MS - v7 Modification of screens Fix errors of alignment angles (signed)

Data.Name: MPU_HMI
Data.Comment: HMI for activation or deactivation of MPU settings

Data.Name: AEB_BrakeTorqueGain
Data.Comment: Value of the braking gain applied on the driver braking.

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: MCC.Confidence_Level
Data.Comment: Confidence level of the cyclist for a AEBS target

Data.Name: MCC.Life_Time
Data.Comment: Time since the object has been defined as the MCC

Data.Name: MCC.Vxcyc_rel
Data.Comment: Cyclist longitudinal velocity relative to host predicted path.

Data.Name: MCC.Vycyc_rel
Data.Comment: Cyclist lateral velocity relative to host predicted path.

Data.Name: MCC.Xcyc_rel
Data.Comment: Cyclist longitudinal distance relative to host predicted path. Reference point, mid centre bumper.

Data.Name: MCC.Ycyc_rel
Data.Comment: Pedestrian relative position to the host vehicle for MCP

Data.Name: MCP.Confidence_Level
Data.Comment: Confidence level of the pedestrian for a AEBS target

Data.Name: MCP.Life_Time
Data.Comment: Time since the object has been defined as the MCP

Data.Name: MCP.Vxped_rel
Data.Comment: Pedestrian longitudinal velocity relative to host predicted path.

Data.Name: MCP.Vyped_rel
Data.Comment: Pedestrian lateral velocity relative to host predicted path.

Data.Name: MCP.Xped_rel
Data.Comment: Pedestrian longitudinal distance relative to host predicted path. Reference point, mid centre bumper

Data.Name: MCP.Yped_rel
Data.Comment: Pedestrian relative position to the host vehicle for MCP

Data.Name: MCV.Confidence
Data.Comment: Confidence level of the car for a AEBS target

Data.Name: MCV.Cor_Lateral_Position
Data.Comment: lateral position of track (curve corrected) (positive = track on the right).

Data.Name: MCV.Lat_Speed
Data.Comment: Lateral speed of track (positive = track moving to the right).

Data.Name: MCV.Stationary_Object
Data.Comment: The object is not moving, and has never been seen moving in the past

Data.Name: MCV.Angle
Data.Comment: Angle to track (not curve corrected) (positive = track on the right).

Data.Name: Param_veh_2.Steer_gear_ratio
Data.Comment: Gear between angle of steering wheel and steering angle

Data.Name: Param_veh_2.RPLB
Data.Comment: "1 = Mounted with connector down (towards ground) -1 = Mounted with connector up (towards sky)"

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: Plant Alignment checking.Horizontal Alignment value on EEPROM
Data.Comment: Right is Positive, Left is NEGATIVE This is the current offset after RunTime

Item.Text: 03: Not ready-System Failure and vehicle moving

Data.Name: Plant Alignment checking.State of radar in alignment

Item.Text: 04: Mirror kept in the same Position.

Data.Name: Plant Alignment checking.Vertical Alignment value on EEPROM
Data.Comment: up is positive, down is negative This is the current offset after Run Time

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.Vehicle Heigth
Data.Comment: Minimum height be passable by the vehicle. Example: 1.5m means that only underpassings of less than

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.Wheel Base
Data.Comment: Longitudinal distance between the center of tire contact of pair of wheels on same vehicle side (Whe

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.Longitudinal_Displacement
Data.Comment: Longitudinal displacment related to vehicle center of gravity

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.Center_of_gravity_hgt
Data.Comment: Center of gravity height (Imaginary point where the total weight of the body may be thought to be co

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.AxisLoadDistr
Data.Comment: The ratio of the vertical load at rear axle to total vehicle vertical load

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.Sterring Ratio
Data.Comment: The ratio between steering wheel angle and the steer angle.

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.Lateral_displacement
Data.Comment: Lateral displacement related to vehicle reference point

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.WhlTcksPerRev
Data.Comment: Number of sensor pulses per wheel revolution

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.Overhang
Data.Comment: Longitudinal distance from the center of front axle group to the front most point

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.PitchAngle
Data.Comment: Angular displacement about sensor lateral axis (+ down)

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.RollAngle
Data.Comment: Angular displacement about sensor longitudinal axis

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.YawAngle
Data.Comment: Angular displacemnt about vehicle vertical axis

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.CoverDamping
Data.Comment: Attenuation of secondary surface (two-way) in dB

Data.Name: Param_Sensor.ElevationMountingPosRadarSensor
Data.Comment: Elevation mounting position of radar sensor (distance to road plane)

Data.Name: Param_Sensor.LongiMountingPosRadarSensor
Data.Comment: Longitudinal mounting position of radar sensor (distance to rear axis)

Data.Name: Safety_monitoring.Private_CAN_CRC_enable
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable clock check.

Data.Name: Safety_monitoring.Private_CAN_Clock_enable
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable checksum check.

Data.Name: Plant Alignment checking.Horizontal Alignment value on EEPROM-factory
Data.Comment: Right is Positive, Left is NEGATIVE This is the measured offset at factory

Data.Name: Plant Alignment checking.Vertical Alignment value on EEPROM-factory
Data.Comment: up is positive, down is negative This is the measured offset at factory

Data.Name: RawSensor_data
Data.Comment: Driver pushing rate on gaz pedal

Data.Name: MCC.MCC_Accel_Long_rel
Data.Comment: Confidence level of the cyclist for a AEBS target

Data.Name: DA_veh1.Vehicle speed at AEB start T1
DA_veh1.Vehicle speed at AEB start T1 + 200ms
DA_veh1.Vehicle speed at AEB start T1 + 400ms
DA_veh1.Vehicle speed at AEB start T1 + 600ms
DA_veh1.Vehicle speed at AEB start T1 + 800ms
DA_veh1.Vehicle speed at AEB start T1 + 1s
DA_veh1.Vehicle speed at AEB start T1 + 1.2s
DA_veh1.Vehicle speed at AEB start T1 + 1.4s
DA_veh1.Vehicle speed at AEB start T1 + 1.6s
DA_veh1.Vehicle speed at AEB start T1 + 1.8s
DA_veh1.Vehicle speed at AEB stop T2
P1.P_tng_Nm_EVO_CityBrakingAebsReq
Data.Comment: Value of torque requested by AEBS city

Data.Name: P1.P_tng_Nm_EVO_MaximumBrakingAebsReq
Data.Comment: Value of torque maximum that could be requested by AEBS EVO

Data.Name: P1.P_tng_Nm_EVO_ModerateBrakingAebsReq
Data.Comment: Value of moderate torque requested by AEBS EVO

Data.Name: P1.P_tng_Nm_EVO_StrongBrakingAebsReq
Data.Comment: Value of strong torque requested by AEBS EVO

Data.Name: P1.P_tng_Nm_NoBrakingAebsReq
Data.Comment: Value of torque meaning no braking

Data.Name: P1.P_tng_Nm_PWBTMax
Data.Comment: Max saturation applied to MinPowerTrainWheelTorque before its substraction to AEB brake wheel torque

Data.Name: P1.P_tng_Nm_PWBTMin
Data.Comment: Min saturation applied to MinPowerTrainWheelTorque before its substraction to AEB brake wheel torque

Data.Name: DA_veh_Ev2.Vehicle speed at AEB start T1
DA_veh_Ev2.Vehicle speed at AEB start T1 + 200ms

RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: P_tng_s_E_HighlyCrtlTTC_Ped
Data.Comment: If the pedestrian braking starts at a TTC lower than this value, than the braking will go to the imp

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifierList
Data.Comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory
